prestazioni: Engine swap to a J35Y6 (3.5L V6 direct-injection from the 2016+ Honda Pilot) with a custom billet crankshaft from Manley Performance (stroke increased to 3.7L) and forged pistons from JE Pistons (11.5:1 compression ratio). Pair with a custom turbo kit featuring a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger, Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate, and a PRL Motorsports intercooler core (4.5" thick, 22" x 12" x 4.5") with custom piping by Vibrant Performance.

Full bolt-on fuel system upgrade: Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can setup with -10AN lines. ECU reflash via Hondata KPro V4 with a custom tune by Church Automotive Testing (CAT) to optimize for E85 fuel and boost levels up to 18 psi.

Suspension overhaul with KW Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 8" front/7" rear travel) paired with Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear). Reinforce the chassis with a Cusco 4-point strut tower bar and Hardrace front and rear camber kits (adjustable to -3.5 degrees front, -2.8 degrees rear). Upgrade to StopTech ST-60 slotted rotors with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody kit (RB-Odyssey-01) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (3.5" wider front, 4" wider rear) and a custom front splitter with integrated canards from Seibon Carbon. Rear diffuser by Varis Japan with integrated exhaust outlets for a dual 3.5" titanium exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power.

Custom 20x9.5" (front) and 20x11" (rear) forged wheels by Work Emotion CR Kiwami in a 5x114.3 bolt pattern, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/20 front, 295/30/20 rear). Wheel spacers by Muteki (15mm front, 25mm rear) for aggressive flush fitment.

Full interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (front row) wrapped in Alcantara and red stitching by Katzkin. Custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (8-point, TIG-welded chromoly) with integrated harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Full custom gauge cluster by Defi (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) mounted in a carbon fiber dash overlay by Seibon.
